name: Arni Souvlaki (Skewered Lamb) #1
recipeInstructions:
Serves: 6-8 Cooking time: 15 minutes
1. Cut the lamb into cubes measuring 4 cm (1 1/2 inches).
2. Place the lamb in a glass or earthenware dish.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the lamb, mixing well to coat the meat and covering the dish.
4. Refrigerate the mixture for 12-24 hours, stirring occasionally.
5. Remove the lamb from the marinade and thread pieces onto metal skewers. Optionally place bay leaf pieces between the lamb cubes.
6. Cook over a hot grill or glowing charcoal, basting frequently with the marinade.
7. Grill for 15 minutes or until cooked to taste.
8. Place on a platter and garnish with parsley and lemon wedges. Serve hot.
